detaileddescription.para: Header key for specifying the server name to connect to the DS hub socket with.
Header key for specifying if we are using AMS or custom DS manager
Server name that is associated with this DS hub connection. Set on connection.
Websocket instance that is connected to the DSHub server.
Delegate fired when successfully connected to DS Hub.
Delegate fired when failed connecting to DS Hub.
Delegate fired when connection to DS Hub is closed (either by server or client).
Delegate fired when the server associated with this DS hub connection is claimed by a session.
Delegate fired when the server associated with this DS hub connection receives a backfill proposal from matchmaking V2.
Delegate fired when the server associated with this DS hub connection receives game session member changed from session.
Delegate fired when the game session associated with this DS ended (game session deleted or all of the users left).
Delegate fired when the server associated with this DS hub connection receives session secret.
Delegate fired when the server associated with this DS hub connection receives a backfill ticket expired from matchmaking V2.
Delegate fired when try to reconnect repetitively to DS Hub websocket.
Delegate fired when websocket reconnect getting massive outage.

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, float InPingDelay=30.f, float InInitialBackoffDelay=1.f, float InMaxBackoffDelay=30.f, float InTotalTimeout=60.f)
memberdef.name: ServerDSHub

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient, float InPingDelay=30.f, float InInitialBackoffDelay=1.f, float InMaxBackoffDelay=30.f, float InTotalTimeout=60.f)
memberdef.name: ServerDSHub

briefdescription.para: Connect to the DSHub websocket. Must be logged in with server client credentials to continue.
Disconnect from DSHub if already connected.
Check whether the websocket is currently connected to the DSHub server.

simplesect.para: true if it's connected, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: set a delegate to be triggered when successfully connect to DSHub.
set a delegate to be triggered when error connecting to DSHub.
set a delegate to be triggered when DSHub connection is closed.
Bind a delegate to listen to server claim notifications from DS hub.
Bind a delegate to listen to backfill proposal notifications from DS hub.
Bind a delegate to listen to game session members changed notifications from DS hub.
Bind a delegate to listen to game session ended notifications from DS hub.
Bind a delegate to listen to session secret update from DS hub.
Bind a delegate to listen to backfill ticket expired notifications from DS hub.

detaileddescription.para: Unbind notification delegates

briefdescription.para: Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when an attempt to reconnect websocket has been done.
Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when connection is down & can't be reestablished. Longer than usual.

detaileddescription.para: Create an instance of our websocket to connect to the DSHub server.
Delegate handler for when our DSHub websocket successfully connects
Delegate handler for when our DSHub websocket fails to connect
Delegate handler for when we receive a message from the DSHub
Delegate fired when our websocket closes
Delegate fired when reconnect attempt
Delegate fired when reconnect getting massive outage

briefdescription.para: DS Hub API for communication from dedicated server to backend. Unlike other servers which use HTTP, DS hub server uses WebSocket (RFC 6455).
